{{Quote|The mission is to capture the city, not level it.|[[Roan Shryne]]|<ref name="Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader">''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''</ref>}}
A '''battle''' on [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]] took place during the final days of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] staged an assault of Murkhana, headquarters of the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] and residence of [[Magistrate/Legends|Magistrate]] [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]].

==Prelude==
With the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] having been driven on to the defensive after [[Operation Durge's Lance]], the CIS reinforced its holdings in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The Republic pursued them into the Rim, beginning the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]. Murkhana fell into the [[Felucia theater]], which included the [[Foundry of the Confederacy/Legends|Foundry of the Confederacy]] and so was the site of some of the war's fiercest fighting.<ref name="Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> As the origin point of much Separatist propaganda through the [[Shadowfeed/Legends|CIS Shadowfeed]], the Republic had great incentive to take the planet.<ref name="Author's Cut">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 8: Tales of the Clone Wars}}</ref>

[[Republic High Command/Legends|Republic High Command]], as part of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] policy of "winning the hearts and minds of the Separatists," ordered that the Republic armada wait several weeks to give Corporate Alliance personnel the chance to surrender. Instead they used it to lace the entire planet with a thick, blaster blocking, anti-laser aerosol, a tactic used by Republic forces at the [[Battle of Paarin Minor]].

==The battle==
After three weeks of fighting, [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Roan Shryne]] and [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo]], accompanied by [[Bol Chatak]] and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Olee Starstone]], led an assault on an Alliance [[Murkhana Landing|landing platform]] in [[Murkhana City/Legends|Murkhana City]], leading a wing of [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunships]] from the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Gallant (Victory I-class)|''Gallant'']]. The clone forces fought against [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and [[NR-N99 Persuader-class droid enforcer/Legends|tank droids]] across the city. General Shryne, aided by the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Climber (clone)|Climber]] and his [[Ion Team|Ion Squad]], succeeded in destroying the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]] that protected the landing platform.

However, the fall of the platform coincided with the execution of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], which saw the deaths of three [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on Murkhana. However, Climber and his squad refused to carry out the order on Roan, Bol and Olee, allowing them time to flee.

Shortly after, the Galactic Republic then [[Declaration of a New Order|transformed]] into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the Confederacy continced to the fight the newly established Empire for Murkhana until the deactivation of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] occurred. Resulting in all droid units on Murkhana shut down immediately and ended the battle in the Empire favor.

The Jedi meanwhile had disguised themselves as Corporate Alliance mercenaries. With no droids left to fight, [[clone stormtrooper]]s focused on rounding up their organic enemies, including the Jedi.

==Aftermath==
[[File:Murkhana.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The ''[[Exactor/Legends|Exactor]]'' arrives in orbit of Murkhana a few weeks after the Clone Wars' end.]]
As a consequence of the battle, the Republic was able to close down the [[Shadowfeed/Legends|Shadowfeed]], the Separatists' [[Propaganda/Legends|propaganda]] broadcast.<ref name="Author's Cut" />

Roan, Bol and Olee were captured on the landing platform, awaiting transport to the prison facility on [[Agon Nine]]. Darth Vader himself [[Mission to Murkhana (Great Jedi Purge)|landed]] in Murkhana City to learn who was responsible for the escape of the Jedi. Climber admitted his actions, though Bol Chatak suddenly revealed herself as a Jedi and engaged Vader in a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] duel. The [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] beheaded the [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] Jedi, though Roan and Olee were able to avoid boarding the transport, and later escaped Murkhana aboard a [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|CloakShape fighter]]. Murkhana was now under the control of the newly-formed [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
